@font-face {

body {margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; background: #FFF;}

.skip-link {position: absolute !important; width: 1px !important; height: 1px !important; margin: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; clip: rect(0 0 0 0) !important; -webkit-clip-path: inset(50%) !important; clip-path: inset(50%) !important; white-space: nowrap !important; font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: max(1px, .0625rem); text-underline-offset: .1em; font-size: 14px; font-size: .875rem; line-height: 1.1428571429; display: block; padding: 10px 15px;}

.skip-link:active,

.skip-link:focus {outline: 3px solid #fd0; outline-offset: 0; background-color: #fd0;}

.row {width: 100%;}

.row-hdr {background-color: #005596;}

.header {padding: 22px 0 30px 0;}
.header-logo {flex-grow: 1;}
.header-logo-a {display: inline-block; width: 233px; height: 82px; background: url(/tpls/images/2017/bdbc-logo-white.svg) no-repeat; background-size: 233px 82px; border: 2px solid transparent;}
.header-logo-a:focus {outline: none; background-color: transparent; box-shadow: none; border: 2px solid #fd0;}
.pdfpage .header-logo-a {background: none;}
.pdfpage .header-logo img {width: 233px; height: 82px;}

.header-search-ic {position: relative; display: inline-block;}
.header-search-i {box-sizing: border-box; width: 300px; height: 55px; border: 2px solid #FFF; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 1.25rem; padding-left: 15px; padding-right: 65px;}
.header-search-i:focus {outline: 3px solid #fd0; outline-offset: 0; box-shadow: none; border: none;}
.header-search-btn {box-sizing: border-box; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; background: #FFF; color: #212F59; outline: none; border: none; border-radius: 0 5px 5px 0; width: 55px; height: 55px; font-size: 36px; font-family: 'icomoon' !important; line-height: 55px; padding: 0 0 0 10px;}
.header-search-btn:focus {outline: 3px solid #fd0; outline-offset: 0; box-shadow: none; border: none;}


.header-nav #cludo-search-form .search_autocomplete,
.header-nav #cludo-search-form-content .search_autocomplete,
.header-nav .cludo-search-form .search_autocomplete,
.header-nav .cludo-search_autocomplete .search_autocomplete {top:60px; left: 5px;}

@media (min-width: 40.0625em)

}

.alert {font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.25; padding: 1rem 0;}
.alert-h2 {font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.25; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; padding: 0; color: #000;}
.alert-txt > :last-child {margin-bottom: 0;}
.alert-txt > p {font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0 0 15px 0; padding: 0;}
.alert-txt a {color: #000;}

.cookie-oc {padding-top: 20px; border-bottom: 10px solid #0000; background-color: #f3f2f1;}
.pdfpage .cookie-oc {display:none !important;}
.cookie-ic {}
.cookie-btn {font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; -webkit-box-sizing: border-box; box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-block; position: relative; width: 100%; margin: 0 0 17px 0; padding: 8px 10px 7px; border: 2px solid #AD0062; border-radius: 0; color: #fff; background-color: #AD0062; text-align: center; vertical-align: top; cursor: pointer; -webkit-appearance: none; text-decoration: none;}
.cookie-btn:hover {background-color: #FFF; color: #AD0062;}
.cookie-btn:active {top: 2px;}
.cookie-btn:focus {background: #FFF; color: #AD0062; border-color: #fd0; outline: none; box-shadow: none;}
.cookie-btn:focus:not(:active):not(:hover) {background: #AD0062; color: #FFF;}

@media (min-width: 40.0625em)
{
  .cookie-li {display: inline-block;}
  .cookie-btn {font-size: 1.1875rem; line-height: 1.4; width: auto; margin-right: 15px;}
}
</style>


<style>

.bc {margin: 20px 0 20px 0; padding: 0; list-style-type: none;}
.bc:after {content: ""; display: block; clear: both;}
.bc li {display: inline-block; position: relative; margin-bottom: 20px; margin-left: 10px; padding-left: 15.655px; float: left;} /* 250819*/
.bc li:before {content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: -3.31px; width: 7px; height: 7px; margin: auto 0; -webkit-transform: rotate(45deg); -ms-transform: rotate(45deg); transform: rotate(45deg); border: solid; border-width: 1px 1px 0 0; border-color: #505a5f;}
.bc li a {font-family: arial,sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: max(1px, .0625rem); text-underline-offset: .1em; color: #AD0062; padding-top:23px;}/*250817 250908*/
.bc li.sel a {color: #005596;}
.bc li a:focus,
.bc li.sel a:focus {color: #000; text-decoration: none;}
.bc li a:hover {text-decoration-thickness: max(3px, .1875rem, .12em);}
.bc li:first-child {margin-left: 0; padding-left: 0;}
.bc li:first-child:before {content: none; display: none;}

.row-info {margin-bottom: 30px;}
.row-lnd-tasks {margin-bottom: 20px;}
.row-pad > .row-ic,

.row-pad-n > .row-ic {max-width: 850px;}
.row-pad > .row-ic p:first-child {margin-top:0;}
.row-main > .row-ic:not(:empty) {position: relative;}
.row-alert {background: #FFDD00;}
.row-alert > .row-ic {box-sizing: border-box; text-align: left; margin: 0 auto; min-width: 320px; max-width: 1410px; padding: 0 20px;}

.row-bgl-bgc {background-position: left center;}

  .row-grid .grid-content-14 {width: calc(25% - 15px);} 
  .row-grid .grid-content-13 {width: calc(33.33% - 13.33px);} 
  .row-grid .grid-content-12 {width: calc(50% - 10px);} 
  .row-grid .grid-content-23 {width: calc(66.66% - 10px);}
